abilities.name: Demise
abilities.description: Falls unconscious = killed. On death, all within p2 suffer 2 damage + Fire effect.

abilities.name: Fire Immuto Demise
abilities.description: On death, damaged characters gain Burning +1.

actions: (1) Claw (Pugilism) | AV: 4 (9) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/3/4 damage.
(1) Elemental Blast (Thrown Weapons) | AV: 4 (9) | Rg: z8 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/3/4 damage.
system.notes: Small elemental Fire construct summoned by spellcasters. Immune Burning. All attacks inflict Burning +1. On death explodes with fire.
